title: Shift from example to principle
subtitle: Move upward in abstraction.
overview: Module: Long-Form Speaking. B2 Hi develops high-B2 independence: layered argument, long-form speaking, deep native input, professional authority, precise style, complex topics, and C1 readiness.

sections.title: B2 hi focus
rows: High B2 speaking often moves from a concrete example to a broader principle.
高 B2 口语常常从具体例子上升到更广原则。
B2 Hi frame: plan the arc, mark transitions, develop examples, recover smoothly, and close with authority.
B2 Hi 框架：规划脉络、标记转折、展开例子、自然恢复，并有力收尾。
Move from an example to a principle.
从一个例子上升到原则。
My example was about recording one answer, but the principle is broader: learners need visible evidence of their own output so they can notice and improve it.
我的例子是录一个回答，但原则更广：学习者需要自己输出的可见证据，这样才能注意并改进它。

items.en: High B2 speaking often moves from a concrete example to a broader principle.
items.zh: 高 B2 口语常常从具体例子上升到更广原则。

items.en: B2 Hi frame: plan the arc, mark transitions, develop examples, recover smoothly, and close with authority.
items.zh: B2 Hi 框架：规划脉络、标记转折、展开例子、自然恢复，并有力收尾。

items.en: My example was about recording one answer, but the principle is broader: learners need visible evidence of their own output so they can notice and improve it.
items.zh: 我的例子是录一个回答，但原则更广：学习者需要自己输出的可见证据，这样才能注意并改进它。

items.en: I will make the answer independent, not just correct.
items.zh: 我会让回答独立，而不只是正确。

items.en: A high B2 answer should show structure, judgment, tone control, and real examples.
items.zh: 高 B2 回答应该显示结构、判断力、语气控制和真实例子。

items.en: If my idea is complex, I will guide the listener with clear transitions.
items.zh: 如果我的想法复杂，我会用清楚转场引导听者。

items.en: I can revise for precision without making the language heavy.
items.zh: 我可以为了准确而修改，同时不让语言变沉重。

items.en: This lesson should help me speak and write with more authority and more humility.
items.zh: 这节课应该帮助我更有权威感也更谦逊地说和写。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Move from an example to a principle.
lines.zh: 从一个例子上升到原则。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: My example was about recording one answer, but the principle is broader: learners need visible evidence of their own output so they can notice and improve it.
lines.zh: 我的例子是录一个回答，但原则更广：学习者需要自己输出的可见证据，这样才能注意并改进它。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more independent and better structured?
lines.zh: 你能让这个回应更独立、结构更好吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the issue, add depth, address a complication, and close with a practical implication.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义问题、加入深度、处理复杂点，并用实际影响收尾。

items.en: Move from an example to a principle.
items.zh: 从一个例子上升到原则。

items.en: Answer once in seven or eight sentences with clear transitions.
items.zh: 用七到八句话回答一次，并使用清楚转场。

items.en: Add one high-B2 move: define a term, answer an objection, or qualify the conclusion.
items.zh: 加入一个高 B2 动作：定义术语、回应反对意见或限定结论。

items.en: Record the answer and revise one sentence for precision and natural rhythm.
items.zh: 录下回答，并修改一句话，让它更准确、节奏更自然。

items.en: Keep the revised version as a model for future C1 Bridge practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的版本保留为未来 C1 Bridge 练习的模型。
